name: Shrimp with Pumpkin Seed Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 Pickled Jalapeno Pepper - Rinsed, Seeded, and Finely Chopped
2 tbsp Pumpkin Seeds - Toasted and Coarsely Chopped (Salted)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the shrimp by removing shells and deveining if needed.
2. Rinse, seed, and finely chop the pickled jalapeno pepper.
3. Toast the pumpkin seeds until they are lightly browned and sprinkle with salt.
4. In a large skillet, heat oil over medium heat. Add onion and garlic; cook until tender but not brown.
5. Stir in flour, then add the tomatoes, jalapeno peppers, coriander, salt, bouillon granules, and sugar. Cook, stirring occasionally, until thickened and bubbly.
6. Stir in shrimp and simmer for about 10 minutes or until shrimp are cooked through, stirring frequently.
7. Mix pumpkin seeds and lime juice; cook until heated through.
8. Serve over hot cooked rice.
